---
name: Bug Report (Operational Integrity)
about: Report a technical issue that affects the system's stability or security.
title: "[BUG]: "
labels: bug, critical
assignees: ''

---

## 🔍 Context
**Project Affected:** [e.g., ojo-de-paz-core]
**Severity:** [Low / Medium / High / Critical]

## 📋 Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## ⚙️ Operational Impact
How does this bug affect the "Operational Integrity" of the system? (e.g., Does it allow a timing attack? Does it bypass validation?)

## 🛠 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Error appears '....'

## ✅ Expected Behavior
What should happen according to our engineering standards?

## 🛡️ Security Implications
Does this vulnerability expose sensitive data or hardware attestation protocols?
